name: png-steganography
description: Full-stack PNG steganography application with Rust/WASM

scripts.build:wasm: cd stegano-lib && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && copy target\wasm32-unknown-unknown\release\stegano_lib.wasm ..\server\wasm\stegano_lib.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ..\client && npm install
